description: Manifest module compose templates — keyed by driver type + role. Placeholders filled by manifest_compose.py.

templates.module_java_api_prod:
{service}:
    image: {service}
    container_name: {service}
    build:
      context: {module_build_context}
      dockerfile: {dockerfile_prod}
    ports:
      - "${{{port_env}:-{port_default}}}:${{{port_env}:-{port_default}}}"
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: prod
      JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS: >-
        -XX:+UseContainerSupport
        -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0
        -XX:+UseG1GC
        -Xms256m -Xmx1g
{credential_env_block}{credential_volumes_block}    env_file:
      - {secrets_rel}/.env.prod
    networks:
      - {network_key}
    restart: always
{resource_limits}    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:${{{port_env}:-{port_default}}}{health_path} | grep -q UP || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 90s
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "3"
templates.module_java_worker_prod:
{service}:
    image: {service}
    container_name: {service}
    build:
      context: {module_build_context}
      dockerfile: {dockerfile_prod}
    ports:
      - "${{{port_env}:-{port_default}}}:${{{port_env}:-{port_default}}}"
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: prod,docker
      JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS: >-
        -XX:+UseContainerSupport
        -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0
        -Xms128m -Xmx512m
    env_file:
      - {secrets_rel}/.env.prod
    networks:
      - {network_key}
    restart: always
{resource_limits}    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:${{{port_env}:-{port_default}}}{health_path} | grep -q UP || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-file: "3"
templates.module_backend_worker_prod:
{worker_service}:
    image: {worker_image}
    container_name: {worker_service}
    build:
      context: {backend_context}
      dockerfile: worker/Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "${{WORKER_PORT:-8091}}:${{WORKER_PORT:-8091}}"
    environment:
      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: prod
      API_INTERNAL_URL: ${{API_INTERNAL_URL:-http://{api_service}:${{API_PORT:-8090}}}}
      JAVA_TOOL_OPTIONS: >-
        -XX:+UseContainerSupport
        -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0
        -Xms128m -Xmx512m
    env_file:
      - {secrets_backend}/.env.prod
    depends_on:
      {api_service}:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - {network_key}
    restart: always
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget -qO- http://localhost:${{WORKER_PORT:-8091}}/actuator/health | grep -q UP || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "20m"
        max-file: "3"
templates.module_ui_stack_dev:
{service}:
    image: {service}
    container_name: {service}
    build:
      context: {module_context}
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      target: development
    ports:
      - "${{DEPLOY_HOST_PORT:-5177}}:${{APP_DEV_CONTAINER_PORT:-5177}}"
    volumes:
      - {app_dev_mount}:/app
      - /app/node_modules
    environment:
      VITE_API_URL: ${{VITE_API_URL:-http://localhost:${{API_PORT:-8090}}}}
    depends_on:
      {primary_api_service}:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - {network_key}
    restart: unless-stopped
{resource_limits}    develop:
      watch:
        - action: sync
          path: ./src
          target: /app/src
        - action: rebuild
          path: package.json
templates.module_ui_stack_prod:
{service}:
    image: {service}
    container_name: {service}
    build:
      context: {module_context}
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      target: production
      args:
        VITE_API_URL: ${{VITE_API_URL:-http://localhost:${{API_PORT:-8090}}}}
    ports:
      - "${{DEPLOY_HOST_PORT:-5177}}:80"
    depends_on:
      {primary_api_service}:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - {network_key}
    restart: unless-stopped
{resource_limits}    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "-qO-", "http://localhost/"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s
